positive: Minimalist vector-style illustration of a majestic mountain range silhouette at sunset, featuring stylized alpine peaks and scattered pine trees. The sky should have clean, gradient color washes of deep indigo, fiery orange, and soft lavender. Foreground elements should be composed of solid black shapes for high contrast. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, ideal for placement on a hoodie. Use a clean, flat graphic design aesthetic with bold lines and clean edges. No gradients within the silhouette itself, only in the background sky.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poor composition, realistic photography, oil painting, grunge, cartoon, messy, cluttered
